title: Troubleshooting
excerpt: description: Troubleshoot common R2 issues including CORS errors, 403 responses, and cache behavior. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. If you are encountering a CORS error despite setting up everything correctly, you may follow this troubleshooting guide to help you. If you see a 401/403 error above the CORS error in your browser console, you are dealing with a different issue (not CORS related).
